title: Synapse App From Scratch
description: How the platform you are reading was designed, built and is operated — architecture and low-level design drawn from the real code, with UML, the decision record and the prices each decision paid, the technology stack and what it cost, the git-to-production content pipeline and the in-app path that turns a reader's fix into a pull request, and a case study of the four-node homelab it runs on: measured latency, real failure modes, and the outage that taught it fault tolerance. Every diagram matches the source; every number was measured — including the ones that later proved an earlier chapter wrong.
